title: Moroccan Tagine with Savory Tofu
description: A rich and aromatic Moroccan-inspired stew made with savory tofu, gooey sauce, and spices, served with a side of crusty bread.

ingredients.name: tagine spice blend
ingredients.notes: available at most Middle Eastern markets

ingredients.name: gooey sauce
ingredients.notes: available at most Middle Eastern markets

instructions: Heat olive oil in a large Dutch oven over medium heat.
Add chopped onion and sauté until translucent.
Add minced garlic and cook for 1 minute.
Add cubed tofu and cook until golden brown.
Add tagine spice blend and cook for 1 minute.
Add canned diced tomatoes and stir to combine.
Bring the mixture to a simmer and cook for 20 minutes.
Stir in gooey sauce and cook for an additional 5 minutes.
Taste and adjust seasoning as needed.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh parsley.
